source_code:
# source: https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm/issues/14895
# repo: BerriAI/litellm
# title: [Bug]: connection timeout occurs in high-concurrency scenarios
# 
# ### What happened?
# in high-concurrency scenarios, litellm will get such error
# After investigation, it was found that it was because `aiohttp.TCPConnector` has default limit=100.
# There are two solutions:
# 1. set `DISABLE_AIOHTTP_TRANSPORT=true`, use the default transport of httpx
# 2. Add a configuration to set the connection size of aiohttp.TCPConnector(limt=x) and httpx.Limit()
# ### Relevant log output
# ### Are you a ML Ops Team?
# Yes
# ### What LiteLLM version are you on ?
# v1.76.1
# ### Twitter / LinkedIn details
# _No response_

After investigation, it was found that it was because `aiohttp.TCPConnector` has default limit=100.

There are two solutions:
1. set `DISABLE_AIOHTTP_TRANSPORT=true`, use the default transport of httpx
2. Add a configuration to set the connection size of aiohttp.TCPConnector(limt=x) and httpx.Limit()

### Relevant log output
